title: Unable to copy & paste from Local drive to a server connected thru mRemote
author: pchackoCAS
body_snippet:
Hi,

I am using mRemote 1.77.0.41252 to easily access my various servers. There are times I need to copy & paste between mRemote sessions and my local machine but the paste function does not work when I attempt to do that. Is this a set up issue? How do I resolve it?

Thanks
Paul

iterations.description: Issue lacks detail on protocol (RDP/VNC), whether clipboard and drive redirection are enabled in connection settings, and whether the failure is for text or files — RDP file copy requires both RedirectClipboard and RedirectDrives to be enabled.

comments.author: VShawn

check these.

if it still not working, maybe you meet the same bug with me. yesterday my server was dead for paste from local machine, then after a server reboot remote paste function works again.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Issue lacks detail on protocol (RDP/VNC), whether clipboard and drive redirection are enabled in connection settings, and whether the failure is for text or files — RDP file copy requires both RedirectClipboard and RedirectDrives to be enabled.
Approach: Ask reporter to confirm protocol, enable RedirectClipboard + RedirectDrives in connection properties, and share exact mRemoteNG version; if redirection settings are correctly enabled but copy-paste still fails, investigate RDP session options passed to MSTSCLib ActiveX control.
